title: Steve Gilmour
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Steve Gilmour''' is one of the core game designers of [[BioWare]]'s ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''.<ref name="KOTOR">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>

*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''
